title: Another Kind of Cuteness!
detail_text: <:th_ch0202/>The end of the semester is getting closer.... Just looking at the calendar makes me feel sick....<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>If you have time to look at the calendar, please solve the problems in front of you.<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0202/>Looking at the problems doesn’t help either....<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>I’ll explain anything you don’t understand, okay?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0202/>Shioko~, let’s just stop studying and go practice. Kasumin will teach you some more cute poses! Alright!?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>....Haven’t you been practicing cute poses all this time?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0202/>Eh?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>Whenever you try to solve a problem with all your might, another kind of cuteness overflows from you, Kasumi-san. I feel like studying has awakened the even more adorable version of you that has been lying dormant.<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0202/>Eeeeeh!? Really!?!? Then, maybe Kasumin will try a little bit harder~♪<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>Fufu, that’s the spirit!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0000/>Translated by SIFAStheatre and Idol Story<:dt_line_end/>
